title: Subfolder support in API
excerpt: Hi, there! I can’t find any reference in docs for subfolder creation and listing through API. Can someone give me a clue if there is support for this feature yet?

posts.author: gus.furtado (Gustavo Furtado (A-Players Brazil))
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, there! I can’t find any reference in docs for subfolder creation and listing through API. Can someone give me a clue if there is support for this feature yet?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @gus.furtado

There is no API support for (sub)folfers.
